tools.name: codespell
tools.scope: full project excluding task yamls and test data

tools.name: mypy
tools.scope: currently disabled - ignore_errors set to True for all modules

linting.notes: Primary linting is done via pre-commit hooks. Ruff handles both linting and formatting. Mypy is configured but currently disabled in CI. The SKIP env var must be set to skip 'no-commit-to-branch' and 'mypy' hooks.

testing.mock_patterns: Uses HuggingFace transformers with small models (EleutherAI/pythia-14m) for testing. Test data includes YAML configs and sample datasets.
testing.notes: Tests use pytest-xdist for parallel execution (-n=auto). Some model-specific tests are ignored (neuralmagic, openvino). Tests download small models and datasets during execution. The test suite takes ~8-9 minutes to run fully. Matrix testing in CI covers Python 3.8, 3.9, 3.10, 3.11.

ci.notes: unit_tests.yml is triggered on push to main and pull_request. It runs linting and a matrix of CPU tests across Python versions. The new_tasks.yml workflow only runs when lm_eval/tasks/** or lm_eval/api/** files are modified. Tests install torch with CPU-only wheels to avoid GPU dependencies.

build.notes: Uses pyproject.toml with setuptools backend. The package is installed in editable mode for development. Multiple optional dependency groups are available: dev, testing, api, multilingual, math, vllm, etc. For validation, the dev+sentencepiece+api extras are sufficient.

conventions.test_naming: Functions starting with test_, classes starting with Test
conventions.import_style: Ruff enforces isort style with known-first-party=['lm_eval'], 2 lines after imports
conventions.notes: Test data is excluded from linting (exclude: ^tests/testdata/). __init__.py files have relaxed import rules (F401, F402, F403 ignored).

lint_commands.notes: Passed. Found minor EOF issues that pre-commit auto-fixed. Ruff, ruff-format, and codespell all passed.
Passed. Ruff linter found no issues.
Passed. Ruff formatter found no issues.

test_commands.notes: 72 passed, 3 failed in 507.63s. The 3 failures are numeric tolerance issues in test expectations (model output variations), not infrastructure problems. Tests run successfully.

container_recipe.notes: Tests download HuggingFace models and datasets on first run, which takes time. Use --extra-index-url https://download.pytorch.org/whl/cpu to get CPU-only torch builds. The full test suite takes ~8-9 minutes. For faster iteration, run specific test files or use -k to filter tests.

validation.summary: install OK, lint OK (auto-fixed EOF issues), tests OK (72 passed, 3 failed with numeric tolerance issues)

gaps: Mypy type checking is configured but currently disabled in CI (all modules set to ignore_errors=True)
Some model-specific tests (neuralmagic, openvino) are always skipped in CPU test runs
3 tests have numeric tolerance issues causing intermittent failures (test_model_generate, test_printed_results)
Coverage threshold is not enforced - coverage reporting is available but not gating
Tests require downloading models and datasets from HuggingFace, which may fail if network is restricted
